overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage featuring a futuristic vehicle driving through a neon-lit underground tunnel. The clip shows the car overtaking another vehicle while navigating the multi-lane roadway, with vibrant cyan and magenta lighting illuminating the concrete industrial architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit underground vehicular tunnel with industrial concrete architecture

events.description: ego vehicle accelerates and signals left to begin overtaking the silver sedan ahead
ego vehicle completes passing the silver sedan on the left and moves into the left lane

agents.ego_description: navigating a futuristic sports car through the underground tunnel, executing a left lane change to overtake slower traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving in the right lane, being overtaken by the ego vehicle

entered.detail: overhead industrial ceiling with glowing cyan and pink neon tube lights
rough concrete wall with industrial piping and metal grating
smooth concrete wall featuring large colorful graffiti murals
large green and red dragon artwork painted on the right tunnel wall
large red cylindrical ventilation ducts running along the left wall
dark asphalt road with reflective wet patches
double yellow lines dividing the lanes on the tunnel floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a futuristic vehicle through a cyberpunk-style underground tunnel. Vibrant neon lights in cyan and magenta illuminate the industrial concrete walls, which feature graffiti art and ventilation pipes. The driver overtakes a silver sedan on the left, moving into the left lane as the tunnel stretches ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit underground vehicular tunnel approaching camera transition

events.description: camera begins rising upward from the standard follow position toward the roof of the vehicle

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive straight through the tunnel as the camera perspective shifts to an overhead view

entered.detail: rear windshield of the ego vehicle becoming visible as camera ascends
sleek black roof of the futuristic vehicle filling the frame as camera moves overhead

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving through the tunnel after the overtaking maneuver, with the road ahead clear. Around the 22-second mark, the camera begins a smooth transition, rising from its position behind the car to an overhead perspective. The rear window and roof of the vehicle gradually fill the frame while the neon-lit tunnel ceiling remains visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit industrial tunnel that shifts from a trailing chase perspective to a high overhead view. It begins behind a futuristic vehicle as it navigates a concrete corridor illuminated by vibrant cyan and magenta lights, passing graffiti-covered walls and ventilation pipes. As the car overtakes a silver sedan and moves into the left lane, the road ahead opens up into a clear stretch of the underground highway. The camera then smoothly rises from its position, transitioning upward until the roof and rear window of the vehicle fill the frame. Finally, the perspective settles into an overhead angle, leaving the glowing tunnel ceiling to recede into the distance.
